source: ESPN 2026 World Cup injuries tracker, fetched 2026-06-12; confirmed ruled-out players weighted by role, doubtful players mostly excluded

Brazil.note: Rodrygo (ACL, key), Estevao (hamstring, likely starter) and Eder Militao (hamstring, depth) all ruled out; Neymar short-term calf strain excluded from adjustment

Netherlands.note: Timber (groin), Xavi Simons (ACL), De Ligt (back surgery) and Schouten (ACL) all ruled out

Germany.note: Gnabry (adductor) and ter Stegen (thigh) ruled out; Karl replaced in squad

Japan.note: Mitoma (hamstring, key) and Minamino (ACL) ruled out

Spain.note: Fermin Lopez (metatarsal, 13 goals and 17 assists in 2025-26) ruled out

Australia.note: Miller (Achilles, wing-back starter) ruled out; O'Neill doubtful

Ghana.note: Kudus (hamstring setback, key starter) participation doubtful

Canada.note: Davies (captain) day-to-day with hamstring after prior ACL; Flores (fringe) out

South Africa.note: Two players sent off v Mexico, suspended for match 25 v Czech Republic

Mexico.note: One player sent off v South Africa, suspended for match 28 v South Korea
